daily_summary.headline: Aurora and Launches: A Day of Celestial and Technological Wonders

top_events.title: G2 Geomagnetic Storm
top_events.description: A G2 geomagnetic storm is expected, providing excellent aurora viewing opportunities for observers at latitudes down to 55°.
top_events.action: Check aurora forecasts and prepare for photography.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Starlink Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 will launch a batch of Starlink satellites, continuing to expand the global internet constellation.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for launch details.

top_events.title: Electron StriX Launch
top_events.description: Rocket Lab's Electron rocket will launch the StriX satellite for Synspective, enhancing Earth observation capabilities.

alerts.title: G2 Geomagnetic Storm Alert
alerts.message: A G2 geomagnetic storm is expected on March 20, 2026, providing excellent aurora viewing opportunities for observers at latitudes down to 55°.
alerts.action_required: Prepare for aurora viewing and photography if you are in the visibility range.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
